full_text:
Chen Su 陳肅
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Su (陳肅)was born in Xiapi. Made an imperial courtier by Cao Pi in honour of Chen Gui’s accomplishments. Chen Su was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
